_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremC_depth_scaling.py (C7). Mirrors the C7Config dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §7.7. C7 is exact operator-level grouped spectral-only finite-depth scaling in the band-RRS class. Contraction-style overlay (ρ★)^(2L) is the theorem-level reference; NO generic L^{-β_b} power-law fit is claimed.
